name: pathfinder-visualizer
description: Full-stack pathfinding visualizer with AI support

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.build:client: npm run tw && npx ng build --project client
scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.start: concurrently -n TW,CLIENT,SERVER -c blue,cyan,yellow "npm run tw -- --watch" "npm run start:client" "npm run start:server"
